column2: # 1. Calculate Summary Statistics (Mean, 95% CI, and Median)
median_rating = median(rating_prior, na.rm = TRUE), # Added median
lower = mean_rating - qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se,
upper = mean_rating + qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se
ggplot(data, aes(x = contingency, y = rating_prior, fill = contingency)) +
# Add the 95% Confidence Interval error bars
aes(y = mean_rating, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
subtitle = "Black dots = Mean (with 95% CI); Red diamonds = Median",
